title: AutoPulse EV Telemetry Frame (US-006)
description: Strict schema for read-only EV telemetry frames using a shared envelope and isolated EV payload.

battery_soh.description: Battery State of Health as a percentage.

battery_soce.description: ZEVonUDS State of Certified Energy percentage, not driver-facing State of Charge. Adapter source documentation must identify the DID/source and confirm this value is not an SOC proxy.

battery_temp_avg.description: Average high-voltage battery temperature in Celsius with a physics-based EV pack thermal ceiling.

traction_motor_speed.description: Optional traction motor speed in RPM. Negative values are valid only with documented source sign convention.

battery_throughput.description: Cumulative lifetime Ah throughput. Negative values are not permitted; this field does not represent net or signed throughput.

grid_energy_in.description: Cumulative off-board grid energy in kWh with a generous lifetime vehicle ceiling.
